user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH  
Category: Customer Success / Account Management  
Flag: VIP customer — escalate or notify account owner/CSM  
Sentiment: Negative / dissatisfied  
Recommended action: Follow up promptly, acknowledge frustration, and confirm ownership of the issue.

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry for the frustration this has caused. I understand why this feels unacceptable, especially given the impact it’s having on you and your team.

I’ve flagged this with priority and am making sure the right people review it. We’re looking into what happened and what we can do to address it properly.

To make sure we’re aligned, here’s what I’m doing next:

1. Reviewing the details of the issue and recent account activity.
2. Escalating this to the appropriate internal team for urgent attention.
3. Following up with you as soon as we have a clear update or next step.

I don’t want to give you a vague answer or overpromise, but I do want you to know this is being taken seriously. Thank you for raising it directly — we’ll work to make this right.

Best,  
[Your Name]
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the VIP status, categorized the ticket, and provided an empathetic draft response as requested by the user.
